message:
test(unit): expand recorder_lexical_ingest.rs inline tests (14→44) (wa-1u90p.7.1)

+30 new tests covering: constants validation, LexicalIndexerConfig
clone/debug, LexicalIngestError display (IO permission, fingerprint
exact format), error trait impl, From<io::Error> conversion, debug
formatting, TantivyIndexWriterAdapter counter behaviors (empty commit,
delete counter, interleaved add/delete, multiple deletes, counters
reset each commit), LexicalIndexer accessors (fingerprint determinism,
handles validity, index reference schema, create_writer default memory,
doc_count tracking), read_stored_fingerprint edge cases (whitespace trim,
newline trim, empty file, nonexistent dir), index lifecycle (creates
missing directory, persists fingerprint, reopen without fingerprint file),
delete semantics (nonexistent event, same event twice), large batch
commit (100 docs), egress-only indexing, index reopen preserves documents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
